title: Change milestone input to use plus sign button like tasks

requirements.summary: Replace one-per-line milestone input fields with a plus sign button interaction pattern that matches the task addition UI
acceptanceCriteria: Milestones section shows a single text input with a plus/add button, not pre-rendered rows for each milestone.
Clicking the plus button (or pressing Enter) appends the typed milestone to the list and clears the input field.
Existing saved milestones are displayed as a list with individual delete/remove controls.
The milestone add interaction is visually consistent with the task add pattern used elsewhere in the planner.

file_operations.description: Replace the milestone input section to use a single text input field with a plus/add button instead of rendering one input row per milestone. Display existing milestones as a list with individual remove buttons. Match the interaction pattern used for task additions in DailyPlanner.tsx, WeeklyPlanner.tsx, and MonthlyPlanner.tsx, including Enter key support to append milestones. Ensure the new UI updates the local state and triggers the mutation to save changes to the backend.
